title: トレンドへテイクオフ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I spot the lively trio again while I'm out
shopping.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hair ties, hair ties! ♪ Cool, cute, and stretchy to
boot! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I hope there are a ton of cute ones to pick
from! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
So this article says cute hair starts with a cute tie,
huh. Being stylish sounds like a ton of work.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
You can't be a real grown-up without keeping up
with the latest trends. ♪ That's just how it works!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Wait, I'm feeling some deja vu here... Didn't we
already have a conversation like this?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Uh-huh! Wasn't it about pins?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hair ties are where it's at now! C'mon, get with
the times! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Get with the tiiimes! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
We said we'd get matching pins, but did we
actually?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Um... We did look for some...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: But they didn't have much of a selection.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Plus, the shops here are close to school, so we'd
just end up with the same ones everyone else has.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
So we ventured into the fashionable grown-up
side of town to find the hottest stuff!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
The streets were full of stylish grown-up ladies, all
shiny and glamorous!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
And all the shops had so many zeroes on their
price tags!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Sooo... we left empty-handed and sad.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
But, we did have those super-trendy desserts as a
little treat.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, we totally did! Those desserts were tasty!
I'm gonna try making them myself sometime! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Bono! Today, it's dress over desserts!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
This will be the day we finally buy the trendiest
item around—hair ties!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! ♪ You can do it, Maya! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I said "we," Bono! That means all of us! Right,
Curren?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Yeah, totally! ♪ Let's all become style savvy! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Okey-dokey! Let's race our way to the top of the
trends!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan and Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Yeah! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun's drive to keep up with the
latest tricks and tips could also help her running...
maybe.
